caption: A man with a dark complexion sits in a recording studio, wearing a green baseball cap and a matching dark green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT THE" in white lettering. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. The background features a wall decorated with framed photographs and a white mannequin torso wearing a white shirt. To the right, clothing racks are visible. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left and red text on the right that says "DOLLY TOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking while looking slightly off-camera to his left, with his facial expressions and mouth movements changing slightly as he talks. The camera remains static, and the setting and surrounding objects do not change.
